reference: I am fifteen years old and I dance. For a while now, after sleeping, I wake up with these lower back pains. More recently, I have been experiencing tingling and numbness in my upper right thigh. One day at school, these pains occurred all of a sudden, and they hurt when I was walking out of class. I really would like help in diagnosing the problem with my thigh. Can you help?
text: I can't take the car out.
